qa_pairs.question: What PLUMED version is used with GROMACS-Plumed v2021.4 in the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: GROMACS-Plumed v2021.4 uses PLUMED v2.7.3 in the StdEnv/2020 environment.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to run GROMACS-Plumed v2021.4 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS-Plumed v2021.4 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2020 environment, you need to load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs-plumed/2021.4`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are necessary for running GROMACS-Plumed v2021.4 with GPU acceleration (CUDA) in the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS-Plumed v2021.4 with GPU acceleration (CUDA) in the StdEnv/2020 environment, the following modules are needed: `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.4 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs-plumed/2021.4`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the compilation notes for GROMACS-Plumed v2021.4 in the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: The compilation notes for GROMACS-Plumed v2021.4 in the StdEnv/2020 environment are GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW.

qa_pairs.question: Which PLUMED version corresponds to GROMACS-Plumed v2021.2 under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: GROMACS-Plumed v2021.2 is associated with PLUMED v2.7.1 in the StdEnv/2020 environment.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load the modules for GROMACS-Plumed v2021.2 to run on CPUs in the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: You can load the modules for GROMACS-Plumed v2021.2 to run on CPUs in the StdEnv/2020 environment by loading `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs-plumed/2021.2`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required for GROMACS-Plumed v2021.2 with CUDA support in the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: For GROMACS-Plumed v2021.2 with CUDA support in the StdEnv/2020 environment, you need `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.0 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs-plumed/2021.2`.

qa_pairs.question: What compilation components are listed for GROMACS-Plumed v2021.2 in the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: GROMACS-Plumed v2021.2 in the StdEnv/2020 environment uses GCC & MKL for compilation.
